name: Paul Blackburn
transactions: June 4, 2012:Drafted by theChicago Cubsin the1st round(56th pick) of the 2012 amateur draft. Player signed June 15, 2012.
July 20, 2016:Traded by theChicago CubswithDaniel Vogelbachto theSeattle MarinersforJordan Pries(minors) andMike Montgomery.
November 12, 2016:Traded by theSeattle Marinersto theOakland AthleticsforDanny Valencia.
July 30, 2024:Traded by theOakland Athleticsto theNew York MetsforKade Morris(minors).
August 21, 2025:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
January 15, 2026:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
